common.pendingOnboardingSaveError: Your account was created, but we could not save the remaining setup. Please try again.
common.pendingOnboardingCompletionError: We could not finish setting up your account. Please sign in and try again.
common.profileLoadError: We could not load your account profile. Please try signing in again.
common.profileMissingError: Your account profile is not ready yet. Please try signing in again.

landing.title: Run your team from one place.
landing.description: Team management for school hockey programs and independent coaches.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Use the email and password linked to your Clutch account.

accountType.title: Are you a coach or a director?
accountType.description: Choose the role that matches how you will use Clutch.
accountType.directorDescription: Create and manage a school hockey organization.
accountType.coachDescription: Join a school organization or manage your own team.

coachPath.title: How will you coach?
coachPath.description: You can join a school using its code or start with an independent team.
coachPath.joinDescription: Use the join code shared by your organization director.
coachPath.independentDescription: Create a team without joining a school organization.

directorSignup.title: Create your organization
directorSignup.description: Create your account and the school organization you direct.
directorSignup.confirmationPendingMessage: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in to finish setting up your organization.
directorSignup.onboardingError: Unable to create your organization. Please try again.

joinOrganization.title: Join your organization
joinOrganization.description: Enter the code from your director and the team you coach.
joinOrganization.confirmationPendingMessage: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in to finish joining your organization.
joinOrganization.onboardingError: Unable to join the organization. Please try again.

independentCoachSignup.title: Set up your team
independentCoachSignup.description: Start with your own team. You will not need an organization code.
independentCoachSignup.confirmationPendingMessage: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in to finish setting up your team.
independentCoachSignup.onboardingError: Unable to create your team. Please try again.

home.title: Team hub
home.description: Welcome, {{name}}. Choose what you want to manage today.
home.directorDescription: View every team in your organization or manage the join code coaches use to join.
home.noActiveTeamDescription: No active team is available yet.
home.superAdminDescription: Moderation tools are outside this Week 2 UI slice.

teamSwitcher.title: Switch teams
teamSwitcher.description: Choose the team you want to work with in this session.

directorOnly.title: Director access only
directorOnly.description: This screen is only available to directors.

directorAllTeams.title: All Teams
directorAllTeams.description: Every team in your organization appears here.
directorAllTeams.noSchoolError: Your organization could not be found.
directorAllTeams.emptyDescription: Teams will appear here once coaches join or teams are created.

directorSettings.title: Director Settings
directorSettings.description: Manage organization settings coaches need during onboarding.
directorSettings.noSchoolError: Your organization could not be found.
directorSettings.loadError: Unable to load your organization settings.
directorSettings.joinCodeDescription: Share this code with coaches so they can join your organization.
directorSettings.regenerateError: Unable to regenerate the join code. Please try again.
directorSettings.regenerateDuplicateError: Unable to generate a unique code. Please try again.
directorSettings.confirmDescription: This invalidates the old code immediately. Anyone with the old code will no longer be able to join.
